ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when GDP data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "gdp_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when GDP data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the indicator data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country for which the data point belongs */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data point is collected */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator for the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" INTEGER /* Quality score for the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the year */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country for which the data collection belongs */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data collection is collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data collection was collected */,
  "collection_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data collection */,
  "collection_quality" INTEGER /* Quality score for the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the economic data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the economic data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data triggering the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, update) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the notification (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)
